# Advanced HUD – *Fabric Edition*  
> A clean and customizable in-game HUD for FPS, Coordinates & Ping 🎮📊

![Advanced HUD Screenshot](https://share.razuuu.de/i/J.qmB5T.png)

🔍 **What is this?**  
*Advanced HUD* is a **client-side mod** for Minecraft that adds a minimal, sleek overlay showing your FPS, coordinates, and ping — no clutter, just the essentials.

---

## ⚙️ Features

✅ Real-time FPS display  
✅ Coordinates overlay  
✅ Ping indicator  
✅ Minimalist design  
✅ Fully client-side – no server required

---

## 🛠️ Configuration

If you're using [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu):  
➡️ You can tweak all settings directly in-game

Prefer manual config?  
📁 Just edit the `advancedhud.json` file in your config folder.

---

## 🧩 Requirements

| Component          | Details / Download               |
|--------------------|----------------------------------|
| Loader             | [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/)  |
| ModMenu *(optional)* | For in-game config UI ✨      |

---

## ✅ Supported Versions

| Minecraft Version | Status            |
|-------------------|-------------------|
| **1.21.7**         | WIP |
| **1.21.6**         | WIP |
| **1.21.1**-**1.21.5**         | ✅ Fully supported |

---
